title: selago linearis
intro: Selago linearis, also known as Blue Spurred Coral or Blue Spurred Glinus, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Aizoaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Selago linearis include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and support immune function. Traditionally, Selago linearis is prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with the dried plant parts used in various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
